title: The balance of payments
description: Practice what you know about the balance of payments in this exercise.
topic_path: Open economy: international trade and finance

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following describes something that would definitely be recorded as an increase in the current account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: An increase in net exports
An increase in real GDP
Selling bonds domestically
Selling bonds to foreign citizens
A decrease in factor income earned abroad

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following would NOT be included in the current account of Wakanda?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The nation of Maxistan buys a bond from Wakanda
Remittances from workers in Wizbaland sent back to family members in Wakanda
Exports from Wakanda to the nation of Theopolis
Imports to Wakanda from Hamsterville
Factor income earned by citizens of Wakanda on real assets held in the nation of Housego

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following statements about the current account is accurate?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It is not always balanced.
It is always negative.
It is always positive.
It is always equal to zero.
It is always equal to the financial account.

assessment_items.question_content:
The current account in Wakanda is currently balanced. 

**Which of the following will occur in the balance of payments if Wakanda begins to export more than it imports?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The current account will move to a surplus
The current account will equal zero
The current account will move to a deficit
The financial account will move to a surplus
It will experience a financial account balance

assessment_items.question_content:
Mr. Frank is a citizen of Gatorland. He wants a better return on his savings than he gets in Gatorland, so he buys newly issued government bonds from the nation of Hamsterville.

**How is this purchase counted in the balance of payments in each country?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: A debit in Gatorland’s financial account; a credit in Hamsterville's financial account.
A credit in Gatorland ’s financial account; a debit in Hamsterville's financial account.
A debit in Gatorland’s current account; a credit in Hamsterville's current account.
No impact on Gatorland’s balance of payments; a credit in Hamsterville's current account.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What change will occur in the balance of payments accounts in Wakanda when it sells bonds to Hamsterville?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Financial capital inflows increase
Financial capital outflows increase
Exports increase
Remittances increase
The financial account moves to a deficit

assessment_items.question_content:
Kundu initially had a financial account balance, but then its exports increased.

**Which of the following will occur as a result of an increase in exports?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The financial account will move to a deficit
The current account will move to a deficit
The financial account will equal zero
The current account will equal zero
The current account and financial account will be equal

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following statements about the  financial account is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It can be balanced, show a surplus, or show a deficit
Funds coming into a country are debits to the account, funds leaving the country are credits to the account.
Exports create a financial account debit
Remittances (cash transfers) create a financial account debit
Imports create a financial account credit

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following best describes the balance of payments accounts?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: A record of all international transactions
A record of a bank’s assets and liabilities
A record of all of a country’s exports and imports
A record of the financial capital inflows and outflows in a country
A record of foreign remittances to a country

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following represents the balance of payments?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: $CA=-FA$
$MV=PY$
$\dfrac{1}{MPS}$
$\dfrac{-MPC}{MPS}$
$\dfrac{1}{\text{reserve requirement}}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following statements is true about the balance of payments account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: A surplus in the financial account means there is a deficit in the current account
Only imports and exports are included in the balance of payments
The sum of all credit entries is greater than the sum of all debit entries
Only the movement of financial assets is included in the balance of payments
The sum of all debit entries is greater than the sum of all credit entries

assessment_items.question_content:
**If a country has a trade deficit, which of the following must also be true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It has a financial account surplus
It has a current account surplus
Its exports exceed its imports
More funds are moving out of the country than are moving into a country
More funds are moving into the country than are moving out of the country
